rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE JAMES JOHNSON, SR REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Trustee Bond; Motion For Order To Deposit Trust Funds In Blocked Account
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner Dushawn Johnson's Motion to Set Trustee Bond; Motion for Order to Deposit Trust Funds Into Blocked Account is denied. However, since all parties seem to agree, the Trustee is ordered to prepare a proposed order to transfer all proceeds received by the Trust from the sale of Trust real property located at 256 Thrift Street, San Francisco, CA into a blocked account. No withdrawals shall be made from this blocked account without prior court order. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Tuesday, November 7, 2017.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE MARRIAGE OF RONALD VIRGIL PELOSI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required. petitioner may be asked to address why this court order is being requested given there is a final order of dissolution of the marriage in 1979 and to address two different priests being named as officiants (Rev. Fr. Richard S. O'Rourke, SJ and Rev. Richard Spohn, SJ).
